name: React Native ‚Äî React state & architecture (MEDIUM)
description: Minimize state: derive during render. Use `undefined` + `??` for reactive fallbacks vs one-time `useState(initial)`. Use functional `setState` when next depends on prev. Ground truth: state/shared values represent real state (`pressed`), not derived visuals (`scale`) ‚Äî derive visuals via interpolation.

metadata.intent: Keep React and Reanimated state minimal, correct, and easy to reason about

must_use: Functional updates when depending on previous state
Derived values computed in render when possible
must_not: Mirror props into state with effects for values that should stay reactive

steps.description: Remove redundant state updated from props via `useEffect`; derive totals/counts/strings from props/state in render.
Model ‚Äúuser hasn‚Äôt chosen yet‚Äù as `undefined` and apply `value ?? fallback` so server/prop updates stay reactive.
Use `setState(prev => ‚Ä¶)` for layout/size and counters to avoid stale closures; return `prev` to skip re-render when unchanged.
Ensure shared values represent semantic state; derive transform/opacity from that state with `interpolate` / `useDerivedValue`.
